/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/nebula-poker-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nebula-poker-server.dir/proto/poker.pb.cc.o" -o nebula-poker-server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
